title: Live
notes:
Autocoupled release:
Sides A & D on one LP, sides B & C on second LP.

MADE IN GREAT BRITAIN
Recorded at The Uris Theatre, New York City, except V.S.M. recorded at Ravinia Festival, Chicago.
Mixed at Media Sound Studios, New York City.
